title: Tweaked Spyglass
description: An adjusted version of the spyglass that better reflects its ingredients.
body:
With this pack installed, the spyglass will have different sprite, with an orange coloration on the yellow parts of the original, and with a slight purple tint to its lenses. I made this pack because I wanted a version of item that did better represent its materials, but not as overtly as others have done.

- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required.
